---
title: "A Beautiful Graphic"
format: html
author: "Henry Yang"
execute:
  echo: false
---

Henry Yang is a data maestro!

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(ggplot2)

# Create a beautiful scatter plot of engine displacement vs. highway miles per gallon
ggplot(data = mpg, aes(x = displ, y = hwy, color = class)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "plasma") +
  labs(
    title = "Fuel Efficiency vs. Engine Size",
    subtitle = "Data from 1999 and 2008 for popular car models",
    x = "Engine Displacement (Liters)",
    y = "Highway MPG",
    color = "Vehicle Class",
    caption = "Source: EPA (mpg dataset)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```
